title: [ExportVerilog] Extern module's port types cannot be trusted, use operand types instead

features.name: parameterized extern module with width-dependent ports
features.description: Code should include an extern module declaration with a parameter that controls port bit-widths, so that each instantiation may resolve to a different concrete port type

features.name: multiple instances of parameterized extern module with differing parameter values
features.description: Code should include two or more instantiations of the same extern module using distinct parameter values so that the resolved operand types differ between instances
